description: Maria Sharapova and Binance VP Helen Hai discuss female leadership in Web3, sharing insights on creativity, talent, and the evolving role of women in the industry.
topic_summary: The conversation highlights the importance of hard work and creativity in achieving success in Web3, emphasizing the need for female representation and leadership in the space. [t=0:00] Maria reflects on her journey in sports and creativity, while Helen discusses the future of women in the industry. [t=107:25]
